experience.title: Software Engineering Intern (Backend)
bullets: Implemented backend REST API endpoints supporting Automox's July 2025 Device Inventory rollout, automating device policy deployment and patch-remediation workflows — reducing manual configuration time by 40%.

Built a Python diagnostics utility adopted by backend engineers to automate log and system-state collection across 5+ components, cutting average production incident debugging time from 2 hours to 20 minutes.

Resolved 8+ OS-specific production edge cases during the Agent 1.x to 2.x platform migration by tracing API request flows, diagnosing PostgreSQL query bottlenecks, and validating fixes across cross-platform environments.
Shipped backend changes through CI/CD pipelines with 95%+ test coverage, maintaining regression-tested reliability across device inventory, policy enforcement, and patch automation workflows.

experience.title: C Programming Teaching Assistant (Unix/Linux)
bullets: Debugged segmentation faults, memory leaks, and pointer errors across 100+ C codebases in Unix/Linux; performed structured code reviews that improved average submission scores by 15%.
Reviewed and validated submissions using Gradescope; identified correctness bugs, edge-case failures, and coding standard violations.
Coordinated a 4-person TA team to standardize grading criteria across 150+ student submissions; designed regrade review workflow adopted as the course-wide standard.
